en.%interlinearizer_dialog_open_prompt%: Choose a project to open in the Interlinearizer:
en.%interlinearizer_projectSettings_continu: Display tokens in a continuous horizontal scroll strip instead of chapter-segmented rows
en.%interlinearizer_viewOption_simplifyPhra: Show phrase controls on focus only
en.%interlinearizer_projectSettings_hideIna: Hide link buttons between phrases in segments that are not currently active
en.%interlinearizer_projectSettings_simplif: Show Phrase Controls on Focus Only
Hide interactive controls (split, unlink, remove-token) on phrases that are not currently focused, leaving only their style change on hover
en.%interlinearizer_projectSettings_chapter: Mark chapter boundaries by labeling the first verse of each chapter as chapter:verse instead of showing an inline chapter header above it
en.%interlinearizer_projectSettings_showMor: Display morpheme breakdown and per-morpheme glosses beneath each word token
en.%interlinearizer_projectSettings_showFre: Display a free-translation input beneath each segment's tokens or baseline text
en.%interlinearizer_linkButton_crossSegment: Cross-segment phrases are not supported. This link button is outside the current segment.
en.%interlinearizer_modal_create_descriptio: e.g. Token-level English glosses for study
en.%interlinearizer_modal_metadata_delete_c: This will permanently delete the interlinear project and all its analysis data. This cannot be undone.
en.%interlinearizer_modal_select_none%: No interlinear projects exist for this source yet.
en.%interlinearizer_confirm_discard_body%: Your draft has changes that haven't been saved to a project. Continuing will discard them.
en.%interlinearizer_modal_saveAs_none%: No existing projects for this source yet.
en.%interlinearizer_modal_saveAs_overwrite_: Overwrite this project? Its saved analysis will be replaced with the current draft.
en.%interlinearizer_wipe_modal_prompt%: Choose how much of the draft's analysis to remove. Save afterward to persist the change to a project.
en.%interlinearizer_wipe_modal_scope_book_d: Removes all analysis for the current book from the draft.
en.%interlinearizer_wipe_modal_scope_all_de: Removes all analysis from the draft.
en.%interlinearizer_error_create_project_fa: Could not create the interlinearizer project. Please try again.
en.%interlinearizer_error_save_metadata_fai: Could not save project info. Please try again.
en.%interlinearizer_error_delete_project_fa: Could not delete the interlinearizer project. Please try again.
en.%interlinearizer_error_update_project_fa: Could not update the interlinearizer project. Please try again.
en.%interlinearizer_error_load_projects_fai: Could not load interlinear projects. Please try again.
en.%interlinearizer_error_save_draft_failed: Could not save your working draft. Please try again.
